14: In summary, "Agent Laboratory" represents a sophisticated framework for
15: autonomous scientific research. It is designed to augment human research
16: capabilities by automating key research stages and facilitating collaborative AI-driven
17: knowledge generation. The system aims to increase research efficiency by managing
18: routine tasks while maintaining human oversight.
